elements.name: Response references the specific topic from the question

steps.name: the SportIQ API is running
the analyst temperature is configured
I send a valid football question
I send the request
I attach the request and response
both analysts should reference the question topic
neither analyst should give a generic non-specific response
the response should be scored by the quality evaluator
